TITUS
Avestan Corpus
Part No. 2

Chapter: 1 
zōt̰. u. rāspī.
Paragraph: 1 
Verse: a    niuuaēδaiiemi. haṇkāraiiemi.
Verse: b       daϑuṣ̌ō. ahurahe. mazdā̊. raēuuatō. xvarənaŋuhatō.1
Verse: c          mazištaheca. vahištaheca. sraēštaheca. xraoždištaheca. xraϑβištaheca.
Verse: d          hukərəptəmaheca.
Verse: e          aṣ̌āt̰. apanōtəmaheca.
Verse: f          huδāmanō.2
Verse: g          vouru.rafnaŋhō.
Verse: h          yō. nō. daδa.
Verse: i          yō. tataṣ̌a.
Verse: j          yō. tuϑruiie.3
Verse: k          yō. mainiiuš.4 spəṇtōtəmō.::
